rca: place_sl_order() in execution/broker.py sends order_type=LIMIT at the SL trigger price. INDstocks /order API only supports LIMIT and MARKET — there is no SL-M for equity intraday. A LIMIT SELL at 18.46 when market price is 18.55 is immediately marketable and fills instantly.
proposed_fix: [FIXED 2026-03-16] Removed place_sl_order() call entirely. SL now monitored by engine evaluate_exits() every 2.5s via price-based check.

rca: place_sl_order() in execution/broker.py sends order_type=LIMIT at the SL trigger price. INDstocks /order API only supports LIMIT and MARKET — there is no SL-M for equity intraday. A LIMIT SELL at 18.46 when market price is 18.55 is immediately marketable and fills instantly.
proposed_fix: [FIXED 2026-03-16] Removed place_sl_order() call entirely. SL now monitored by engine evaluate_exits() every 2.5s via price-based check.

rca: risk_gate.py used int() (floor division) for qty = int(per_stock_limit/price). Floor division structurally guarantees order value is always <= per_stock_limit, often below MIN_ORDER_VALUE. PIDILITIND: int(15000/1342.40)=11, 11*1342.40=14766 < 15000.
proposed_fix: [FIXED 2026-03-16] Changed int() to math.ceil(). Added min/max clamp. Added MAX_ORDER_VALUE=45000 to config.py.

rca: risk_gate.py used int() (floor division) for qty = int(per_stock_limit/price). Floor division structurally guarantees order value is always <= per_stock_limit, often below MIN_ORDER_VALUE. PIDILITIND: int(15000/1342.40)=11, 11*1342.40=14766 < 15000.

proposed_fix: [FIXED 2026-03-16] Changed int() to math.ceil(). Added min/max clamp. Added MAX_ORDER_VALUE=45000 to config.py.

rca: place_sl_order() in execution/broker.py sends order_type=LIMIT at the SL trigger price. INDstocks /order API only supports LIMIT and MARKET — there is no SL-M for equity intraday. A LIMIT SELL at 18.46 when market price is 18.55 is immediately marketable and fills instantly.
proposed_fix: [FIXED 2026-03-16] Removed place_sl_order() call entirely. SL now monitored by engine evaluate_exits() every 2.5s via price-based check.
